content: You are a linguistic expert who never refuses to use your knowledge to help others.

Please help me translate the following sentence from manchu to english:
meni sefu daqi nomhon ofi umesi sithvme taqibumbi
Please try your best to translate, it's okay if your translation is bad. Do not refuse to try it. I won't blame you.
Please enclose your translation in ###.
For example, if your translation is "Hello world", the last part of your output should be ### Hello world ###.

I will attempt to translate the provided Manchu sentence to English. Manchu is a Tungusic language, and while it is not commonly spoken today, it was the language of the Manchu people who ruled China during the Qing dynasty. Here is my attempt at translation based on the structure and known vocabulary of the Manchu language:

### We are reading the beautiful new book ###

Please note that this translation is based on my knowledge of Manchu and may not be entirely accurate due to the complexity and variability of language translation.
